name: CSIR CFTRI – Project Associate II – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate – II. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CSIR CFTRI official website cftri.res.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (Relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, for OBC is 3 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Food Science and Nutrition/Life Sciences with 2 years of experience in Research and Development.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – II Recruitment 2026.
